title.rendered: Echo Park Swan Boats on the Cover of LA Times Weekend Section

content.rendered:
Paddle Pups & Scenic Views: Echo Park Swan Boats Featured in the LA Times!

Looking for a unique, pet-friendly adventure in Los Angeles? You’re in luck—the Los Angeles Times just spotlighted Echo Park Swan Boat rides as one of the top dog-friendly activities in LA! Featured on the front cover of the Weekend section, these iconic pedal boats are making waves as the perfect way to enjoy the outdoors with your furry friend.

Each boat rental lasts one hour, giving you plenty of time to take in the lake’s picturesque views and snap some Insta-worthy shots. Rates are $13 per adult and $7.50 per child (17 and under), making it an affordable and memorable outing for the whole family—pets included!

So grab your pup, soak up the sun, and experience the magic of Echo Park from the water. Reservations are required. Illuminated night rides are available after sunset. See you on the lake!

Date of Article 7/27/2025
